name: @jlc/desktop
description: 小窗 — Electron 桌面壳（PRD v3.0 MVP §5.3.7）

scripts.dev: pnpm icons && pnpm build && node ../../scripts/patch-electron-dev-app.mjs && node ../../scripts/run-desktop-dev.mjs --branded-app
scripts.dev:branded-app: pnpm icons && pnpm build && node ../../scripts/patch-electron-dev-app.mjs && node ../../scripts/run-desktop-dev.mjs --branded-app
scripts.pack:dir: pnpm icons && pnpm build && pnpm prepare:web && pnpm prepare:companion && electron-builder --dir
scripts.pack: pnpm icons && pnpm build && pnpm prepare:web && pnpm prepare:companion && electron-builder
